data.title: Brown & Brown appoints Dori Henderson as CITO to enhance tech strategy and user experience.
data.description: Dori Henderson has been appointed as the Chief Information and Technology Officer (CITO) at Brown & Brown. In this role, Henderson will be responsible for driving the company's technology strategy, enhancing digital capabilities, and improving technology user experiences. Brown & Brown is expected to benefit significantly from Henderson's expertise and leadership in this key area.

data.title: Bio-Techne's Ella Platform gets CE-IVD marking for EU labs, offering rapid immunoassays. Streamlined tool for developers.
data.description: The Ella benchtop instrument has recently received the CE-IVD marking, making it eligible for sale in the European Union. This development allows diagnostic assay developers to utilize a user-friendly platform that offers fast and consistent results while requiring minimal manual intervention. The instrument's certification enhances its suitability for use in clinical trials and internal testing. This advancement marks a significant milestone in ensuring product quality and regulatory compliance, providing assurance to potential users.

data.title: Feb 16, 2026: ReNew Energy Global projected to report $0.12/share loss on $299.80M revenue. Otter Tail to report $1.23/share earnings on $308.17M revenue.
data.description: Before the market opens, ReNew Energy Global (NASDAQ: RNW) is expected to announce a quarterly loss of $0.12 per share with revenue totaling $299.80 million. After the market closes, Otter Tail (NASDAQ: OTTR) is anticipated to report quarterly earnings of $1.23 per share along with revenue of $308.17 million. Additionally, Sonoco Prods (NYSE: mentioned in the news) will also be releasing their financial report. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Binance refutes claims of Iran-linked breaches and investigator firings. No violations found in internal review. Meeting regulatory obligations.
data.description: Binance has confirmed through an internal review with external legal advisors that there were no violations of sanctions. The review also established that the company is adhering to its regulatory responsibilities under the supervision of monitors.

data.title: Heineken Holding N.V. has announced transactions under its ongoing share buyback program.
data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the region has reached 15,000, with 500 newly reported cases in the last 24 hours. Additionally, the number of hospitalizations has seen a significant increase, with 300 individuals currently receiving treatment for the virus. Sadly, the death toll has also risen, reaching a total of 250 fatalities. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and restrictions to curb further spread of the virus.

data.title: Manus introduces AI Agents on Telegram for instant task execution with no setup needed, accessible across all subscription levels.
data.description: Manus has launched a new feature on Telegram called AI Agents, which allows users to complete multi-step tasks within the chat interface. No setup is needed for this feature, and it is accessible on all subscription levels.
